benefits.description: Lessened anxiety/stress, social anxiety and aggression with tension release in body

Improved focus, not hyperfocussing on unnecessary things, getting things done faster without burnout, increased motivation and follow through, able to stay on one task and complete it without feeling overwhelmed

protocol_notes: Subcutaneous administration. Experimented with dosages starting at 100 mcg, found 100 mcg insufficient. Settled on 200 mcg Selank and 300 mcg Semax daily before work. Also takes 300 mcg before social events. Notes that SubQ dosing information is limited online; mentions SubQ requires approximately half the nasal dosage.
